objective: Add JobSpec v0 golden compatibility tests and execute the delete-stubs cleanup slice without changing current agentopsd behavior.
ranked_packet_path: ao lookup: JobSpec compatibility tests delete stubs provider fake worker kinds

tracker_health.reason: bd is available, but ready beads are unrelated to the requested JobSpec compatibility and delete-stubs scope.

done_criteria: JobSpec v0 tests lock durable /v1/jobs submission, idempotent retry, status/events projection, cancel outcomes, lease retry exhaustion, and OpenClaw trigger allowlist behavior.
Delete-stubs cleanup removes dead public declarations where safe and does not remove current behavior required by existing daemon jobs.
Current JobSpec OpenAPI/RFC docs remain parseable and compatibility checks still pass.
Targeted Go tests pass for daemon, agentworker, wikiworker, and LLM surfaces touched by the cleanup.
known_risks: Do not delete WorkerKind string values from runtime payload validation; they are still current GasCity remote agent labels even if the shared exported constants are too broad.
Mutation route tests must keep the exact-path allowlist behavior covered; prior finding f-2026-04-29-005 applies.
Fake production fixtures may be current CLI behavior, not just dead code; remove only the stub/public-contract surface unless tests and docs prove a behavior can be retired.

test_levels.rationale: The change touches HTTP contract tests, queue replay behavior, and shared Go runtime types. Targeted package tests are required; broader CLI gates are advisory if production fake-policy behavior is changed.
